zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Driby於1310年出生時，他的父親Robert Dryby27歲，母親Joan Tattershall55歲。他於1334年與Amie Gaveston在英國越可爾衛克菲德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1357年10月12日享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Driby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Riby (Lincs) or perhaps Ribby (Lancs); on the latter name,  see also  Rigby  . See also   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Rigby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: English: locative name, probably from Gilderdale (Forest) in Alston (Cumb), as suggested by   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  , rather than from Gildersdale in Warter (ER Yorks), as suggested by   Reaney and Wilson  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Driby was born in 1310, his father, Robert Dryby, was 27 and his mother, Joan Tattershall, was 55. He married Amie Gaveston in 1334, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 12 October 1357, at the age of 47.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Driby è nato il nel 1310, il suo padre, Robert Dryby, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Tattershall, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Amie Gaveston nel 1334, nel Wakefield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1357, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Driby(이)가 1310년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Dryby(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Tattershall(은)는 55세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 Amie Gaveston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1357년 10월 12일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Driby nasceu em 1310, seu pai, Robert Dryby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tattershall, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Amie Gaveston em 1334, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1357, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Driby родился в 1310 г., его отцу по имени Robert Dryby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Tattershall, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Amie Gaveston в 1334 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 октября 1357 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Driby nació en 1310, su papá, Robert Dryby, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Tattershall, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Amie Gaveston en 1334, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1357, a la edad de 47 años.
